appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` AppState enum to include `ERROR` so shared architecture knowledge matches `src/app/state.ts`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen procedure enforcement by requiring workers to explicitly log RED->GREEN evidence order when claiming test-first adherence, and require accurate `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` when sequence deviates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `cleanup-and-memory` found code edits preceding test additions while handoff reported `followedProcedure: true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Agent-browser command usage should be documented with concrete command forms.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md (session guidance and tooling notes present)

rejectedObservations.observation: Transcript skeleton payload truncation limits procedural auditability.
rejectedObservations.reason: out-of-scope for repo-local scrutiny worker; mission infrastructure artifact generation is managed outside this project
